fab_section_md:
- A pale-haired boy of four raised up as king by whores in a brothel, supposedly a bastard of the missing King Aegon II (fab-rhaenyra-overthrown-18-p01:85)
- Known as "King Cunny," his court at the House of Kisses on Visenya's Hill issued outlandish decrees (fab-rhaenyra-overthrown-18-p01:105)
- His edicts were reputedly the work of a Dornish whore, Sylvenna Sand (fab-rhaenyra-overthrown-18-p01:275)
identity_line: Gaemon — A pale-haired boy of four raised up as king by whores in a brothel, supposedly a bastard of the missing King Aegon II.

fab_section_md:
- The Sea Snake, imprisoned in a dungeon under the Red Keep, whose captivity drove Velaryon men from Rhaenyra's cause (fab-rhaenyra-overthrown-18-p01:21)
- Two of his sworn swords tried and failed to free him (fab-rhaenyra-overthrown-18-p01:21)
- He was freed from the dungeons by Ser Perkin (fab-rhaenyra-overthrown-18-p01:259)
identity_line: Corlys Velaryon — The Sea Snake, imprisoned in a dungeon under the Red Keep, whose captivity drove Velaryon men from Rhaenyra's cause.
